name: Mixed Salad (Insalata Mista)
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts assorted salad greens, cleaned and torn into small pieces
4 tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fennel, salad greens, chives, and onion on a platter.
2. In a small bowl or jar, combine the vinaigrette ingredients and mix well.
3. Season the vinaigrette to taste.
4. Just before serving, add a small amount of dressing and toss.
5. Add more dressing to coat evenly.
6. Serves 8 to 10.
[MC-Per Serving: 181 cals, 17g total fat (78%cff)]
VARIATION: For a more colorful salad, add julienne of sweet roasted red peppers, pitted marinated olives, capers, and lightly toasted pine nuts.
